rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in valid AADL scopes: component types for assumptions/guarantees, implementations for bindings
Component type contracts should reference ports through valid variables or outputs, not subcomponent ports directly
generic_rules: Preserve AADL structural integrity when inserting AGREE annexes
Use authoritative AADL model data for port and type declarations
Validate AGREE type consistency with AADL data types before insertion
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Assumptions and guarantees must align with component type scope; bindings in implementation scope
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes
Do not reference subcomponent ports directly in component type contracts
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
